name: AI Agent Sandbox
description: Tiered security isolation presets for AI coding agent devcontainers. Audits container runtime posture and warns or fails when excessive privileges are detected.

preset.description: Security preset: strict (no network, no root, no docker.sock), moderate (safe defaults), or permissive (audit-only)

failOnWarning.description: Fail container creation if the audit detects violations for the chosen preset

allowedDomains.description: Comma-separated list of allowed outbound domains for moderate preset
